name: Amplitude
description: Connects to Amplitude Analytics API v2 to sync event data, cohorts, and active user metrics into the Shielva knowledge base. Supports both US and EU data residency regions.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Your Amplitude API Key. Found in Amplitude → Settings → Projects → [Project] → General.

install_fields.label: API Secret
install_fields.help: Your Amplitude API Secret (paired with the API Key). Keep this secure.

install_fields.label: Data Residency Region
install_fields.help: Data residency region: 'us' (default) or 'eu'. Must match your Amplitude project region.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate api_key and api_secret via GET /taxonomy/category. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with the failure reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /taxonomy/category and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full sync: fetches event segmentation for default events, active user counts, and cohorts for the last 30 days. Normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: Export Events
methods.description: Export raw event data as a ZIP archive for a given hour-range (YYYYMMDDTHH format).

methods.name: Get Event Segmentation
methods.description: Retrieve event counts over a date range for a specific event type.

methods.name: List Cohorts
methods.description: List all cohorts defined in the Amplitude project.

methods.name: Get Cohort Members
methods.description: Retrieve user IDs belonging to a specific cohort.

methods.name: Get Active Users
methods.description: Retrieve DAU/WAU/MAU data for a date range.

methods.name: Get User Activity
methods.description: Retrieve event stream for a specific Amplitude user ID.
